name: QNI : Access to Improperly Secured Service - SSL in Use
notes: This rule triggers when QRadar Network Insights detects an SSL session. According to NIST publication 800-52, all versions of SSL should not be used. Recent versions of TLS should be used instead.
conditions_text: when the flow matches Protocol Name is not N/A, Protocol Name is any of SSL
TD_list: APPLY QNI : Access to Improperly Secured Service - SSL in Use on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the flow matches Protocol Name is not N/A, Protocol Name is any of SSL
RED_list: Event name: QNI : Access to Improperly Secured Service - SSL in Use
Event description: Detects when an SSL session has been observed.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
